summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Outfit Shopci e-commerce application. Backend APIs are fully functional with 19/19 tests passing. Frontend UI loads correctly with good design and navigation, but authentication flow has issues preventing full e-commerce workflow completion.

integration_issues.issue: Registration and login forms submit but don't complete authentication flow - users remain on login/register pages
Add to cart works but cart appears empty, preventing checkout flow
Search button/input not found in navigation
Mobile menu button not found for responsive navigation

passed_tests: Backend product endpoints (get products, categories, single product)
Backend product filtering, search, and sorting
Frontend homepage loads with all sections (hero, categories, bestsellers, new arrivals)
Frontend product detail page with size/color selection
Frontend promo banner displays BIENVENUE10 code
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication flow - registration and login forms submit but don't complete the authentication process. This prevents cart functionality and checkout flow from working properly. Also implement search functionality and mobile navigation menu.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (basic UI and navigation work, but authentication and cart flow broken)
